title: Phonely Agent
description: Schema for a Phonely voice agent record as returned by POST /api/get-agent and POST /api/get-agents, and the update payload accepted by POST /api/update-agent.

Agent.description: A Phonely voice agent that answers or places phone calls on behalf of a business.

uid.description: User identifier of the agent owner.

country.description: ISO country code or country name associated with the agent's primary phone number.

businessPhoneNumber.description: Business phone number assigned to this agent in E.164 format.

UpdateAgentRequest.description: Mutable fields that can be updated on a Phonely agent.

uid.description: User identifier of the agent owner.

agentId.description: Identifier of the agent to update.

voiceId.description: Identifier of the voice to use for this agent.

greetingMessage.description: Initial greeting played to the caller.

humanizeConversation.description: When true, enables natural conversation pacing, filler words, and disfluencies.

conversationStyle.description: Conversation style applied across the agent's responses.

orgId.description: Optional organization identifier to associate the agent with.
